bytefreezer Query

Demo Environment — This is a demonstration of bytefreezer-query using sample eBPF data. Not for commercial use. For production workloads, use DuckDB directly or integrate with your preferred analytics tools. more on performance

Query Optimizations

  • Data is partitioned by hour for efficient time filtering
  • Parquet files are pre-sorted by timestamp
  • "Last N events" queries skip ORDER BY (data already recent)
  • Aggregations (COUNT, GROUP BY) are fast - small result sets

For Best Performance

  • Use "recent" or "last N" queries - reads fewer files
  • Avoid ORDER BY on large result sets over remote storage
  • Add filters (WHERE) to reduce data scanned
  • Use LIMIT to cap results
Loading limits...

Example queries

Show me the last 100 events
Count events by type in the last 24 hours
What are the top 10 source IPs by event count?
Show failed events from yesterday
